hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ]; then case "$FILE_PATH" in */CNAME) echo 'Blocked: CNAME is a protected file and cannot be edited.' >&2; exit 2;; *.jpg|*.jpeg|*.png|*.gif|*.webp|*.svg|*.ico) echo 'Blocked: Image binary files cannot be edited directly.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; fi; exit 0
